description: Create and execute a bash script at `~/batch_convert.sh` to batch-convert all Sentinel-2 GeoTIFF files matching `sentinel2*.tif` in `~/snap_data/` to `NetCDF4-CF` format using ESA SNAP's Graph Processing Tool (GPT). The script must iterate through the source files and save the resulting `.nc` outputs to `~/snap_exports/netcdf_batch/`. Ensure the script is made executable and run so that all target files are generated.
